title: Molten Greek Dough Loukoumades
description: A yeasty and molten Greek dish featuring Thai chilli jam, perfect for crowds, and ovo-vegetarian friendly, served in a lazy-susan-spinner vessel.
instructions: Combine flour, yeast, salt, and sugar in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes elastic.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of dough into the hot oil, frying until golden brown.
Remove the fried dough from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the loukoumades warm with Thai chilli jam drizzled on top.
Place the loukoumades in a lazy-susan-spinner vessel for easy serving.
